name: Luscious Little Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a food processor, combine the flour, powdered sugar, and butter until you have fine crumbs. Alternatively, stir the flour and powdered sugar together, then cut in the butter until you achieve fine crumbs. Press the mixture into an 8x8x2-inch glass baking dish to form the crust. Bake for 20 minutes.
3. To prepare the filling, beat the eggs until smooth and lemon-colored. Beat in the granulated sugar, stir in the lemon zest, fresh lemon juice, baking powder, and all-purpose flour. Stir in the sweetened flaked coconut.
4. Pour the filling over the baked crust. Return to the oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned on top. Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the baking dish. Cut into 2-inch squares (4 across by 4 down). Store refrigerated.
